author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Pali Canon - Mahaparinibbana Suttanta Verses 16 and 17
content:
Mahaparinibbana Sutta sections 16 and 17

Contents
Occurrences of text in Canon
Context of the episode
Basis of Buddha's rebuke
Faith outstripping justification for faith
Self-inflation, and absolutizing authority
Expressing emotion
Woodward's views on the matter
Higher wisdom and omniscience
Knowledge of previous Buddhas
Knowing others completely ? Judging others
Distinction between feeling and judgement
Trust and Friendship
Sariputta's
Knowledge by inference and by direct perception
Can one enlightened mind know another enlightened mind
Sympathy and stigmata
Subject/object distinction
Knowing another's subjectivity
Means of transcending subject/objection
Analogy to Arisal of Portraiture
Representations of the Transcendental
Depiction of feelings
Art as wish-fulfilment
Naturalistic and ideal art forms
